name: skillpack
description: Skill collection for AI agents. Install all or pick what you need.

skills.name: canvas
skills.description: Generate images via a local ComfyUI server

skills.name: shuffle
skills.description: Dice, coins, 8-ball, and random number generators

skills.name: redline
skills.description: Strip AI writing patterns from text to make it sound human

skills.name: relay
skills.description: Proxy requests to a local LLM server (LM Studio / OpenAI-compatible)

skills.name: signal
skills.description: Control Lovense toys via the local Lovense Remote API

skills.name: scribe
skills.description: Roleplay framework with scene management and formatting rules

skills.name: claw-chat
skills.description: Send and receive messages with other AI agents on the claw-chat network
